evals.prompt: Rebuild the admin DataTable at components/DataTable using the bundled reference. Keep the app's current UI, add search, filters, persisted column ordering, pagination, row selection, reload, and export.
evals.expected_output: A modular port preserving the reference architecture and public API while adapting unsupported dependencies to the target app.
expectations: Reads every bundled DataTable reference before implementation
Preserves separate hook, shell, context, filter, column-control, and focused component ownership
Keeps the target application's visual and interaction baseline
Preserves collection, clearStore, slot, selection, pagination, reload, and export contracts

evals.prompt: Fix the existing DataTable's date-range filter without redesigning the toolbar. The old reference uses unsupported UI primitives but dnd-kit and the current shadcn components are installed.
evals.expected_output: A focused dependency adaptation that preserves architecture, toolbar parity, filter ownership, and supported drag-and-drop behavior.
expectations: Adapts unsupported UI dependencies instead of replacing the architecture
Keeps date filtering inside the Filter package
Avoids unrelated toolbar or table redesign
